changes.description: Baseline run with original skill (nano-pdf edit only). pdf-text-extract=0 (model refused to act, asked user for preference), pdf-merge-info=50 (used PDF metadata instead of page text for titles/authors).

Rewrote SKILL.md to cover text extraction with pdfplumber, PDF merging with pypdf PdfMerger, page count, and numeric parsing. Emphasized page text over metadata. pdf-text-extract=100, pdf-merge-info=75 (PdfMerger import error in pypdf v6+, title extracted as full page text, author still from metadata).
Replaced PdfMerger with PdfWriter (pypdf v6+ compatible). Added explicit pattern for parsing title as first line of page text and author from 'Author:' labeled lines. Both tasks=100.
